productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Sporty Black Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros handbag collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The black bag is spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 17 cm Width: 11 cm Depth: 4 cm Made of a blended fabric for durability Has one large main zipped compartment with an inner insert pocket for essentials Two zipped compartments on the front, one which has a flap and velcro closure One long adjustable and removable strap for carrying ease Branded zips and brand name appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
